G

getBalance() - Method in class proj4.Passenger
Gets the balance of this passenger.
getCapacity() - Method in class proj4.Vehicle
Gets the capacity of this vehicle.
getCityName() - Method in class proj4.TransitSystem
Gets the name of the transit system's city.
getCost() - Method in class proj4.Ticket
Gets the cost of the ticket.
getDiscountRate() - Method in class proj4.ChildPassenger
Returns 0.5
getDiscountRate() - Method in interface proj4.Discountable
Returns the discount rate for the passenger type.
getDiscountRate() - Method in class proj4.SeniorPassenger
Returns 0.3
getDistance() - Method in class proj4.Route
Gets the distance of the route.
getDriver() - Method in class proj4.Bus
Gets the driver of the bus.
getEndStop() - Method in class proj4.Route
Gets the end stop of the route.
getExpiration() - Method in class proj4.Ticket
Gets the expiration date of the ticket.
getFare() - Method in class proj4.Trip
Gets the fare for this trip.
getId() - Method in class proj4.Person
Gets this Person's ID number.
getLicenseNumber() - Method in class proj4.Driver
Gets the license number of the Driver.
getModel() - Method in class proj4.Vehicle
Gets the model of this vehicle.
getName() - Method in class proj4.Person
Gets this Person's name.
getNumUnits() - Method in class proj4.Train
Gets the number of units of the train.
getPassengerCount() - Method in class proj4.Trip
Returns the number of passengers.
getPassengers() - Method in class proj4.Trip
Returns a deep copy of the ArrayList of Passengers.
getRiderCount() - Method in class proj4.Trip
Gets the number of riders.
getRoute() - Method in class proj4.Trip
Gets the Route of this trip.
getRouteName() - Method in class proj4.Route
Gets the name of the route.
getRoutes() - Method in class proj4.TransitSystem
Gets a copy of the ArrayList of routes.
getStartStop() - Method in class proj4.Route
Gets the start stop of the route.
getTicketNum() - Method in class proj4.Ticket
Gets the ticket number.
getTrips() - Method in class proj4.TransitSystem
Gets a copy of the ArrayList of trips.
getUsed() - Method in class proj4.Ticket
Gets the use status of the ticket.
getVehicle() - Method in class proj4.Trip
Gets the vehicle of this trip.
getVehicleId() - Method in class proj4.Vehicle
Gets this vehicle's ID number.
getVehicles() - Method in class proj4.TransitSystem
Gets a copy of the ArrayList of vehicles.
